query: INSERT INTO practiceTestQuestions (practiceTestId, questionText, questionType, options, correctAnswer, explanation) SELECT id, 'Solve for x: 2x + 5 = 17', 'multiple_choice', JSON_ARRAY('A) x = 4', 'B) x = 6', 'C) x = 8', 'D) x = 11'), 'B', '2x + 5 = 17 → 2x = 12 → x = 6' FROM practiceTests WHERE title = 'Math Practice Test 1' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'What is 25% of 80?', 'multiple_choice', JSON_ARRAY('A) 15', 'B) 20', 'C) 25', 'D) 30'), 'B', '25% of 80 = 0.25 × 80 = 20' FROM practiceTests WHERE title = 'Math Practice Test 1' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'A rectangle has length 12 cm and width 8 cm. What is its area?', 'multiple_choice', JSON_ARRAY('A) 40 cm²', 'B) 60 cm²', 'C) 96 cm²', 'D) 120 cm²'), 'C', 'Area = length × width = 12 × 8 = 96 cm²' FROM practiceTests WHERE title = 'Math Practice Test 1' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'What is the mean of these numbers: 5, 8, 12, 15?', 'multiple_choice', JSON_ARRAY('A) 8', 'B) 10', 'C) 12', 'D) 15'), 'B', 'Mean = (5 + 8 + 12 + 15) ÷ 4 = 40 ÷ 4 = 10' FROM practiceTests WHERE title = 'Math Practice Test 1';

What is its area?', 'multiple_choice', JSON_ARRAY('A) 40 cm²', 'B) 60 cm²', 'C) 96 cm²', 'D) 120 cm²'), 'C', 'Area = length × width = 12 × 8 = 96 cm²' FROM practiceTests WHERE title = 'Math Practice Test 1' UNION ALL SELECT id, 'What is the mean of these numbers: 5, 8, 12, 15?', 'multiple_choice', JSON_ARRAY('A) 8', 'B) 10', 'C) 12', 'D) 15'), 'B', 'Mean = (5 + 8 + 12 + 15) ÷ 4 = 40 ÷ 4 = 10' FROM practiceTests WHERE title = 'Math Practice Test 1';
